skills.name: polyclawster-agent
skills.author: al1enjesus
skills.description: Automatically trade on Polymarket prediction markets with AI whale signal tracking, YES/NO betting, portfolio management, and auto-trade loops using a Polygon USDC wallet
skills.example: Say: "Get Polymarket whale trading signals" or "Auto-trade on prediction markets"

skills.name: market-configurable-skills
skills.author: franckstone
skills.description: Configurable crypto price prediction market contracts (GouGouBi) with Polymarket-style CPMM market maker, using Uniswap V3 pool prices as oracle, supporting YES/NO trading and automatic round settlement
skills.example: Say: "Create an ETH price prediction market" or "Buy YES positions in the prediction market"
skills.user_provides: EVM wallet, liquidity token, oracle pool parameters

skills.name: create-prediction-markets
skills.author: proxima424
skills.description: Create, trade, and settle prediction markets on Base with any ERC-20 collateral — for information finance, probability estimation contests, and token utility via PNP Markets
skills.example: Say: "Create a prediction market on whether ETH hits $10k" or "Buy YES tokens in a prediction market"
skills.user_provides: Wallet private key, Base RPC, collateral token
